overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking through the muddy cobblestone streets of Saint Denis, passing the Jade Dragon Restaurant and following horse-drawn carriages toward the train station in atmospheric overcast conditions.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow historic street with Chinese restaurant and sidewalk

events.description: passing close to a man sweeping the sidewalk with a broom
passing a pedestrian in a red coat walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the muddy cobblestone sidewalk next to the Jade Dragon Restaurant storefront

notable_agents.action: man sweeping the sidewalk with a broom
pedestrian in red coat walking toward the camera

entered.detail: green painted historic building with Chinese signage and red banners
large red sign with white text reading JADE DRAGON RESTAURANT
stacked wooden barrels on the muddy sidewalk
black wrought iron fence running along the left side of the street
ornate black cast iron street lamp with glass enclosure

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow cobblestone sidewalk next to the Jade Dragon Restaurant, passing a man sweeping and a pedestrian in red. The street is enclosed by historic buildings with an atmospheric overcast sky visible above.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic street approaching intersection with overhead signage

events.description: emerging from building shadow into slightly brighter diffused light
beginning to turn left toward the intersection with the overhead restaurant sign

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street and beginning to turn toward the intersection ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in the distance toward the intersection

entered.detail: three-story historic building with wrought iron balconies and shuttered windows
metal framework supporting the restaurant sign spanning the street

segments.scene_description: The street opens slightly as the character approaches the intersection, with the Jade Dragon Restaurant sign now visible ahead spanning the street. The corner building with ornate balconies comes into view on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection crossing with overhead sign and horse traffic

events.description: horse rider crosses the cobblestone street ahead of the character
horse-drawn carriage enters the street from the right and begins moving forward

agents.ego_description: crossing the cobblestone street to follow the horse rider, then falling in behind a horse-drawn carriage

notable_agents.action: man on horseback riding across the intersection
horse-drawn carriage with two passengers moving down the street

entered.detail: rider on brown horse crossing the street ahead
black carriage with red wheels carrying two passengers in white clothing

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the open intersection beneath the overhead Jade Dragon Restaurant sign, following a horse rider and then falling in behind a horse-drawn carriage. The space opens up significantly with full sky visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: train station plaza with tram tracks and cargo wagons

events.description: entering the open train station plaza with visible tram tracks and station buildings
camera pans right to reveal the full width of the station plaza and tracks

agents.ego_description: following the carriage through the wide street toward the train station, observing the bustling plaza activity

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage continuing down the street toward the station entrance
man standing next to a loaded cargo wagon

entered.detail: large building with green awnings, multiple arches, and twin towers
network of electrical wires and wooden poles spanning the street
wooden wagon loaded with crates and goods
twin spires on the train station roof visible against the sky

segments.scene_description: The character follows the carriage into the open train station plaza, revealing the large station building with green awnings, overhead tram wires, and cargo wagons. The camera pans to show the wide expanse of the muddy cobblestone area with multiple tracks and historic buildings lining the approach.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a narrow urban corridor that gradually opens into a wider city intersection. It begins on a cramped cobblestone sidewalk beside the Jade Dragon Restaurant, passing a man sweeping the street and a pedestrian dressed in red under an atmospheric overcast sky. As the character advances, the enclosed feeling of the historic buildings gives way to a more expansive view of the street. The scene then opens further as the camera approaches the intersection, bringing an ornate balcony on a corner building into view on the left. Finally, the perspective shifts to reveal the Jade Dragon Restaurant sign spanning the street ahead.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow city intersection into the wide, industrial expanse of a train station plaza. It begins as the character crosses an open intersection beneath the overhead Jade Dragon Restaurant sign, trailing a horse rider and a horse-drawn carriage. As the character follows the carriage forward, the surrounding architecture recedes and the view opens up to reveal a vast sky. The scene then expands into the station plaza, where the camera pans to uncover the large station building with its green awnings and a network of overhead tram wires. Finally, the perspective widens to encompass the muddy cobblestone ground, cargo wagons, and multiple tracks leading toward the historic buildings lining the approach.
